Rating
What Is ScapesMania
ScapesMania is a gaming ecosystem that provides Web3 enthusiasts with opportunities to benefit and influence the development of projects made for a massive casual game audience of Web2 players.
Get a unique opportunity to influence the development of an ecosystem for the mass audience and benefit from its success.
A Project Beyond P2E
The Play-To-Earn market is facing challenges and even the large titles see a drop in the user base and token prices. Traditional gamers are not interested in tokens and crypto entrepreneurs are not interested in games. We create a project that can satisfy both of those markets.
Tap Into the Massive Market
The Gaming market is massive and continues to rise, with casual gamers contributing $376 billion is generated by casual games.The overall market value is projected to grow further, reaching $521.60 billion by 2027.
A Power of Web3 for Traditional Gamers
ScapesMania is a gaming ecosystem built for the casual audience first, but with the help of Web3 we want to give players and crypto enthusiasts the ability to influence the development of the project.
Play-2-Earn
is dead
